purpose: Abandon fixed event direction. At each broad completed-15m state, estimate the net-R outcome of LONG and SHORT under one fixed execution contract, choose at most one side/asset, and retain CASH when validation uncertainty is not positive. The 1-3% daily challenge target is not an optimization objective.

chronology.train_window: up to 3 years ending six months before each test quarter
chronology.validation_window: six months immediately before each test quarter
chronology.purge: a row is eligible for training or validation only when its simulated exit_time is strictly before the cutoff

candidate_clock.entry: actual next 5m open equal to decision_time
candidate_clock.broad_trigger: abs(body_atr15)>=0.25 OR abs(flow_state)>=0.10 OR abs(oi_state)>=0.50 OR close is within 0.25 ATR15 of a prior 4h or 12h rolling external boundary
candidate_clock.gaps: no interpolation; label invalid when holding path crosses a gap

directional_side_coded: flow_state, oi_state, premium_z and funding crowd percentile
distance to prior 4h, 8h and 12h rolling highs/lows
BTC/ETH 4h consensus and asset return relative to the BTC/ETH mean
non_directional: ATR as a fraction of price
top-of-hour, UTC hour sine/cosine and weekday sine/cosine
features.normalization: causal rolling features already stored in the state cache; missing values remain missing for LightGBM and are filled with zero only for Ridge

execution.stop: actual entry price plus/minus 1.00 ATR15 known at decision

validation_selection.selection_score: maximize lb80 mean R, then PF, then trades per operating day
